description_long: This skateboard features a classic double-kick deck with a slightly concave shape and a visibly worn, light blue finish. The deck edges show signs of use, with some chipping and exposed wood along the perimeter. The underside and top of the deck are both blue, with no visible graphics or branding, giving it a minimalist, utilitarian appearance. The skateboard is equipped with two standard silver trucks and four small, gray wheels, typical of street or park skateboards. The wheels are mounted close to the deck, and the trucks appear to be standard kingpin style. There is no visible grip tape or decorative pattern on the top surface, and the overall look is functional and well-used.
description: A well-worn, light blue skateboard with a plain deck, silver trucks, and gray wheels, showing signs of heavy use and no visible graphics or grip tape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blue deck, both trucks, and all four gray wheels.
description_view_1: Narrow end-on view highlighting the rounded nose of the blue deck and the width of the board.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the full blue deck, trucks, and wheels from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view from the tail, showing the rounded end and the width of the blue deck.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small, gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, silver color, no visible branding or unique features
